notes: Core mechanics mostly work but the frog position/row tracking is buggy (y-coordinate uses FROG_OFFSET offset making row detection unreliable), goal slot positions don't span the full canvas width leaving dead zones, and riding logic causes double-movement since lane speed is applied both in checkCollisions and update, making river crossing erratic.

An exceptionally well-crafted Frogger clone with complete mechanics, detailed canvas drawing (including diving turtles and vehicle variants), and sound effects; the only minor flaw is a speed desync when riding logs on levels 2+.

A solid and mostly complete Frogger clone with working movement, hazards, goals, lives, and progression, but it has notable authenticity/layout quirks and some gameplay logic roughness around goal-row handling and platform interactions.
